description: Sock Snob - Children’s Festive Christmas Socks If you're looking for a gift that your kids will love, look no further! Our own branded Sock Snob Kids Christmas Socks are the perfect stocking stuffers for your little ones this holiday season. They come in red, green and light blue colours so they'll go with any outfit. Each pair comes with a festive design which include: Santa Claus, Snowmen, Penguins, Reindeer, Christmas Trees and Gingerbread Men! They're just waiting to keep their feet warm and comfy through the holiday season. Made from cotton rich fibres and are designed to be full of comfort on little feet and have a comfort top to keep them in place. These would make a great stocking filler and you can choose from a range of multipack options: 6 pairs, 12 pairs or 24 pairs - so you can get even more bang for your buck! We all love a little bit of Festive cheer at Christmas time, and these Children’s Festive Christmas Socks from Sock Snob are the perfect way to add some festive colour to their wardrobe. If you're looking for the perfect Xmas gift for your little ones or for someone else's children, look no further than our Kids Festive Christmas Socks from Sock Snob. These socks come in packs of 6, 12, or 24 Pairs, with many festive patterns per pack. They’re made from 51% Cotton 31% Nylon 16% Polyester 2% Elastane, are available in 2 sizes: 9-12 UK (27-30 EUR, 10-1 US) and 12-3 UK (30-36 EUR, 13-4 US) and are machine washable. Extra Product Details Kids Christmas Socks Sock Snob Branded Cotton Rich Fibres Multipack Options: 6, 12 or 24 Pairs 6 Festive Designs Per Pack Comfort Top Red, Green, & Light Blue Colours A Perfect Xmas Gift Great Value For Money 2 Sizes: 9-12 UK & 12-3 UK Machine Washable
